query:
SELECT 
  a.id,
  a.leadId,
  a.corretorId,
  a.createdAt,
  a.dataAgendamento,
  u.name as corretorNome,
  l.name as leadNome
FROM agendamentos a
JOIN users u ON a.corretorId = u.id
JOIN leads l ON a.leadId = l.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Leticia%'
  AND DATE(a.createdAt) = CURDATE()
ORDER BY a.createdAt DESC;
